title: Player Visibility
description: Player Visibility is a fabric mod for Minecraft to hide other players and entities at a press of a key!
body:
## PlayerVisibility ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/rEeBGDR0) Hide players easily! PlayerVisibility is a fabric mod for Minecraft to hide other players and entities at the press of a key! | platform | link | | --- | --- | |   Modrinth | [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-visibility/versions/) | |   CurseForge | [Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/player-visibility/files/all) | |   GitHub | [Download](https://github.com/xNasuni/PlayerVisibility/releases/latest) | #### Help If you need help to figure out how to use this, check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/xNasuni/PlayerVisibility/wiki)!
If you want to report a bug or suggest a new feature, make an issue in [Issues](https://github.com/xNasuni/PlayerVisibility/issues)!
